posts.author: Tomer (Tomer Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m new to Monday and finding the mirror setup challenging.

What I need is simple:
I have a board with people’s names and a board with org’s.
After connecting the people to the org’s, I add an org to each person.
Now I’d like to see in the org’s board which people are there, so I see a mirror, but that doesn’t show anything, Why?

Thanks.
